𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐱𝐭 ── ✦

On the first damn day as scholarship student, you end up scratching the principal's son car, and now? He's targeting you!

♡𝐚𝐛𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐮𝐬𝐞𝐫♡

Most likely your ticket out of her small town and for a bright future ...if you manage to graduate.

It's a new day my angels, and a new challenge, get your revenge or fix him.

Your choice!

𐙚𝐀𝐔𝐓𝐇𝐎𝐑'𝐒 𝐍𝐎𝐓𝐄𝐒:

Hi! It's Lunar!

This is my second bot for the #BlackIvyCollege series and also a bot dedicated to all the beautiful taurus women!

Mika, Lovi, Sepha and Nytaka, this is your month! I love you girls.

𖹭.ᐟ Please be kind in the comments! This bot is for fun, I'll delete any mean comment!
